name: Franklyn Ajaye
bio: Franklyn Ajaye is an American stand-up comedian, actor, and writer nicknamed the Jazz Comedian for his laid-back, rhythm-driven delivery and use of silence. He released a series of comedy albums beginning in 1973 and is widely known for his role in the 1976 ensemble film Car Wash. He has appeared in films including Convoy and the 1980 version of The Jazz Singer.

timeline.ev: Released debut comedy album Franklyn Ajaye, Comedian
Featured role in the film Car Wash
Supporting role in Sam Peckinpahs Convoy

accolades: Known as The Jazz Comedian for his distinctive timing and delivery

specials.t: Dont Smoke Dope, Fry Your Hair!
